ddls:
CREATE TABLE "coupons" (
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon */,
  "coupon_name" TEXT /* Name of the coupon */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the coupon (e.g., 3 Months, 1 Week) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon */,
  "code" TEXT /* Unique code for the coupon */,
  "discount_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon type */,
  "discount_value" REAL /* Value of the discount (e.g., 10% or $5) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon becomes valid */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon expires */,
  "usage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the coupon can be used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the coupon (e.g., active, inactive, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupons_discount_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_type_id") REFERENCES coupon_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coupon type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the coupon type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the coupon type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the coupon type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_product_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum number of times the coupon can be used on this product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_product_links_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_product_links_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_category_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_category_links_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_category_links_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount the user has spent on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coupon_redemptions" (
  "redemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redemption */,
  "coupon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coupon redeemed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who redeemed the coupon */,
  "redemption_date" TEXT /* Date the coupon was redeemed */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of times the coupon was used in this redemption */,
  "total_discount_amount" REAL /* Total amount of discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coupon_redemptions_coupon_id FOREIGN KEY ("coupon_id") REFERENCES coupons ("coupon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
